entry.title: IDC 89303321DEM000061 (P00110) awarded to IDAHO ENVIRONMENTAL COALITION LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Refer to Section H contract clause, H.51 TASK ORDERING PROCEDURE

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
IDAHO CLEANUP PROJECT (ICP) END STATE CONTRACT
THIS MODIFICATION UPDATES SECTION H SPECIAL CONTRACT REQUIREMENTS, ATTACHMENT J-3 REQUIREMENTS SOURCES AND IMPLEMENTING DOCUMENTS, AND ATTACHMENT J-6 WAGE DETERMINATIONS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.
